title: Supporting Diverse Industries Across The Halal Supply Chain
description: We work with businesses across multiple sectors to help achieve Indonesian Halal compliance and strengthen international market readiness.

industry-1.title: Food & Beverage
industry-1.description: Processed foods, frozen products, confectionery, beverages, dairy products, and convenience foods.

industry-2.title: Seafood & Agriculture
industry-2.description: Seafood processing, agricultural exports, spices, coffee, and agricultural ingredients.

industry-3.title: Restaurants & Hospitality
industry-3.description: Restaurants, cafés, catering services, hotels, and tourism businesses.

industry-4.title: Cosmetics & Personal Care
industry-4.description: Cosmetics, skincare, perfumes, and personal hygiene products.

industry-6.title: Manufacturing & Packaging
industry-6.description: Food packaging, food-contact materials, and industrial manufacturing systems.
